---
title: "data_exploration"
author: "Christian Stenbro"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
pacman::p_load("here", "tidyverse")
```

```{r}
# loading data
data <- read_delim("/Users/christianstenbro/AU/MSc/ACM/assignment_4_LOCAL/AlienData.txt")
```
```{r}
data
```

We can remove the .jpg extension from the stimulus column (which is the feature binary codes).

```{r}
data$stimulus <- str_replace(data$stimulus, ".jpg", "")
```

# Visualization

```{r}
data
```
